Name: incometax.gov.in (DIY)
Strengths: Authoritative; pre-fill; the only place you can actually file
Weaknesses: Session timeouts ('Please Wait' loops), confusing utilities, zero hand-holding
Our_wedge: Calm copy-ready walkthrough that mirrors the portal's exact section order

Name: ClearTax (Clear)
Positioning: DIY + autofill, broad; 'File ITR in 3 simple steps'
Strengths: Form 16 visual hero; multi Form 16 merge; capital gains/crypto; trust volume
Weaknesses: Pricier; tier upsell maze; pay before mismatch shown; discontinuing TaxCloud 2026
Our_wedge: Mismatch-first reconcile before any copy to portal; value-before-pay

Name: Quicko
Positioning: DIY + broker autofill, trader-focused; 'File in ~15 min'
Strengths: Broker import (Zerodha/Angel One); F&O turnover wizard; ITD autofill; expandable income nav
Weaknesses: Smaller broker list than ClearTax; slower July support; mismatch is a step not the moat
Our_wedge: Mismatch as hero + honest companion (not auto-file)

Name: TaxBuddy
Weaknesses: CA quality varies; turnaround slows in July; pricing confusion
Our_wedge: Self-serve clarity without forced CA dependency

Name: Tax2Win
Weaknesses: Limited free features; add-ons required for complexity
Our_wedge: Honest single companion unlock, no add-on surprises

Name: KoinX / TaxNodes
Our_wedge: Full ITR companion with CG as first-class head

Name: qna.tax (Quicko forum)
Strengths: Real answers to real edge cases; searchable
Weaknesses: Not a filing tool; answers scattered across threads
Our_wedge: Turn recurring threads into in-product help + guided flow

Name: TaxSaathi / TaxSathi
Weaknesses: Naming overlap risk for our brand

Name: TurboTax (Intuit)
Strengths: Interview gold standard; one Q per screen; filing-ready % before pay
Our_wedge: India AIS/26AS reconcile; pay after value (we reject refund hype)

Name: H&R Block
Strengths: Persistent help pane; income-first wizard; mode switching
Weaknesses: US forms; expert-first tone; max-refund hype

Name: Stripe
Strengths: Incremental onboarding; inline validation; dashboard density; activation KPI
Our_wedge: Treat Form 16 upload like 'first charge'; defer PAN/OTP

Name: Mercury
Strengths: Two-phase gate; real-time doc parse feedback; demo before signup; no upsell
Our_wedge: Phase 1 = name + Form 16; Phase 2 = PAN/bank at pay

Name: Ramp
Strengths: Contextual trust placement; AI reasoning transparency; bento marketing; itemized proof
Our_wedge: Trust cards at upload/mismatch/pay; AI autonomy guardrails

Name: Linear
Our_wedge: Section rhythm; status affordances; motion communicates state
